name: Marian Alexe
title: Senior Frontend Developer
about: Passionate frontend developer with 8+ years of experience building modern, responsive web applications. Skilled in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive interfaces. Strong advocate for clean code, accessibility, and performance optimization.

experience.description: Lead a team of 5 developers building a large-scale SaaS platform. Migrated legacy jQuery codebase to React, improving performance by 40%. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and established coding standards across the frontend team.

Developed responsive web applications for 20+ clients across various industries. Built reusable component libraries with React and Storybook. Collaborated closely with UX designers to deliver pixel-perfect implementations.

Built and maintained the company's main product dashboard using React and Redux. Implemented real-time data visualization features using D3.js. Participated in daily stand-ups and bi-weekly sprint planning.

Assisted in developing client websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Learned version control with Git and agile development methodologies. Created responsive email templates for marketing campaigns.
Designed and developed websites for small businesses. Built custom WordPress themes and plugins. Managed client relationships and project timelines independently.
Maintained and updated the university's internal web portal. Developed a student scheduling tool used by 5,000+ students. Gained experience with PHP, MySQL, and basic server administration.
Contributed to several popular open-source projects on GitHub. Fixed bugs and implemented features for a React component library. Wrote documentation and helped onboard new contributors.
